message:
feat(workspace): extract frankenterm-core-policy-types leaf crate (ft-0pykm / ft-t2d70.3)

Tier-1 leaf crate carved out of frankenterm-core. Holds four leaf-clean
policy submodules (4296 LOC total) — pure type definitions with zero
`crate::*` deps:

- policy_audit_chain.rs (946 LOC) — SHA-256 hash-linked audit trail
- policy_compliance.rs (967 LOC) — compliance assessment + reporting
- policy_metrics.rs (857 LOC) — metrics aggregation + health dashboard
- policy_quarantine.rs (1526 LOC) — quarantine + kill-switch semantics

Mechanics (same template as ft-g6sa8 + ft-otfxs):
- Created crates/frankenterm-core-policy-types/ (deps: serde derive+std+alloc,
  serde_json, sha2, thiserror, hex).
- git mv'd 4 files from frankenterm-core/src/.
- Added the new crate as workspace member + path-dep on frankenterm-core.
- Re-exported via `pub use frankenterm_core_policy_types::{
  policy_audit_chain, policy_compliance, policy_metrics, policy_quarantine };`
  in frankenterm-core/src/lib.rs so existing call sites in policy.rs +
  in-tree consumers compile transparently.

Build verification (CC=llvm-clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc6-target):
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core-policy-types: 2.74s clean
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core: zero policy_*-related errors
  (16 pre-existing replay_* errors are baseline damage from another
  agent's WIP frankenterm-core-replay extraction in commit b7c9f64a —
  not introduced by this change).

NOT extracted in this pass (cross-cluster deps):
- policy.rs (main rule-evaluation engine — connector telemetry composition)
- policy_dsl.rs (1774 LOC, 20 crate:: refs)
- policy_diagnostics.rs (772 LOC, 11 crate:: refs)
- policy_decision_log.rs (759 LOC, 2 crate:: refs)

ft-t2d70 trio complete: error-types (ft-g6sa8), config-types (ft-otfxs),
policy-types (ft-0pykm). Total ~7760 LOC moved from frankenterm-core
into three leaf crates over three sessions; parent ft-t2d70 PARK ADR
remains in effect for the full mcp/connector tier-2 cuts (still need
config.rs split + cass/caut leaves before mcp can move).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-core-policy-types"
+description = "Policy audit/compliance/metrics/quarantine types leaf crate extracted from frankenterm-core (ft-0pykm / ft-t2d70.3)"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive", "std", "alloc"] }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+sha2 = { workspace = true }
+thiserror = { workspace = true }
+hex = "0.4"

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+//! `frankenterm-core-policy-types` — policy audit / compliance / metrics / quarantine types leaf crate (ft-0pykm / ft-t2d70.3).
+//!
+//! Tier-1 leaf crate carved out from `frankenterm-core`. Holds four leaf-clean
+//! policy submodules (4296 LOC total) that have zero `crate::*` deps:
+//!
+//! - [`policy_audit_chain`] — SHA-256 hash-linked immutable audit trail
+//!   (ft-3681t.6.4/.6.5 precursor).
+//! - [`policy_compliance`] — compliance assessment + reporting types.
+//! - [`policy_metrics`] — unified metrics aggregation + health dashboard
+//!   (ft-3681t.7.1/.7.2 precursor).
+//! - [`policy_quarantine`] — quarantine state + emergency kill-switch
+//!   semantics (ft-3681t.6.3 precursor).
+//!
+//! Re-exported from `frankenterm-core` so existing `crate::policy_*::*` and
+//! `frankenterm_core::policy_*::*` paths keep resolving unchanged.
+//!
+//! ## What's NOT here
+//!
+//! `policy.rs` (the main rule-evaluation engine), `policy_dsl`,
+//! `policy_diagnostics`, and `policy_decision_log` all carry cross-cluster
+//! `crate::*` deps (connector telemetry composition, runtime hooks, etc.)
+//! and so are not leaf-clean. They stay in `frankenterm-core` for this pass.
+
+pub mod policy_audit_chain;
+pub mod policy_compliance;
+pub mod policy_metrics;
+pub mod policy_quarantine;
